planSummary: Manual Chrome DevTools MCP QA gate for /employees, /employees/create, /employees/[id], /employees/[id]/edit. Re-run after fixing 6 items (E1, E2, E5, E6, E8, E15).

cases.summary: E1 List table renders nameEn instead of nameAr
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Seed demo data (3 employees with both nameAr + nameEn filled).
2. Open /employees as admin.
3. Inspect the rows in the list table.

Expected:
- Each row title uses nameAr (e.g. د. خالد السبيعي) with nameEn as fallback only.

Post-fix (mapEmployee nameAr-first in apps/dashboard/lib/api/employees.ts):
- Rows now render «د. خالد السبيعي», «د. فاطمة القحطاني», «د. أحمد الغامدي». Verified via MCP snapshot.

cases.summary: E2 Detail page bookings query returns 400 (limit>200)
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Open /employees/{id} for any seeded employee.
2. Watch the network tab.

Expected:
- Charts (bookings by status / by type / revenue) render with data or a clean empty state.

Post-fix (perPage 500 → 200 in employee-bookings-chart.tsx):
- Three GET /api/v1/dashboard/bookings?limit=200&… all return 200/304. Charts render actual data («مكتملة 2», «عيادة 2 / مباشر 1», daily counts).

cases.summary: E3 Create form missing most DTO-required fields
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Open /employees/create.
2. Inspect the «المعلومات الأساسية» tab.

Expected:
- Fields for phone, gender, avatarUrl, employmentType, specialtyIds[], branchIds[], serviceIds[] per plan §6.1–6.2.

Actual:
- Only title, email, nameEn, nameAr, specialty (EN/AR text), experience, education×2, bio×2. No phone/gender/avatar/type/branch/service pickers. Cannot create a complete employee through the UI.

cases.summary: E4 Experience spinbutton has valuemax=0
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Open /employees/create (or /employees/{id}/edit).
2. Inspect the «الخبرة (سنوات)» input.

Expected:
- valuemax unbounded (or a reasonable cap like 60).

Actual:
- DOM shows `spinbutton "e.g. 5" valuemax="0" valuemin="0"`. The native stepper will not advance past 0.

cases.summary: E5 Delete dialog uses nameEn inside Arabic copy
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Open /employees.
2. Click the delete icon on any row.

Expected:
- Dialog body uses nameAr: «حذف د. خالد السبيعي نهائياً؟ ...».

Post-fix (same mapEmployee change — dialog reads from the same object):
- Dialog now reads «حذف د. خالد السبيعي نهائياً؟ ...». Verified via MCP snapshot.

cases.summary: E6 Breadcrumb shows truncated UUID instead of employee name
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Open /employees/{id} or /employees/{id}/edit.
2. Inspect the breadcrumb trail.

Expected:
- Leaf segment renders the employee's nameAr.

Post-fix (detail + form pages pass explicit Breadcrumbs items):
- Breadcrumb now reads «الرئيسية › الممارسون › د. خالد السبيعي» on detail, and «... › د. خالد السبيعي › تعديل» on edit. Verified via MCP snapshot.

cases.summary: E7 Sortable column headers do not trigger backend sort
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Open /employees.
2. Click the «الخبرة» column header.
3. Observe the network call.

Expected:
- GET /dashboard/people/employees?...&sortBy=experience&sortOrder=asc (then desc on second click).

Actual:
- No new network request; sort is a no-op despite the clickable affordance.

cases.summary: E8 Validation errors are partly English on an Arabic UI
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Open /employees/create.
2. Click «إنشاء الممارس» with an empty form.

Expected:
- All four error messages in Arabic.

Post-fix (Zod messages translated in create/form-schema.ts):
- «البريد الإلكتروني غير صالح»
- «الاسم الكامل بالإنجليزية مطلوب»
- «الاسم الكامل بالعربية مطلوب»
- «التخصص مطلوب»

cases.summary: E9 Detail page is one long scroll — no tabs
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Open /employees/{id}.
2. Compare to plan §8 (tabs: general / services / schedule / breaks / vacations / ratings).

Expected:
- Tabbed layout similar to the edit page.

Actual:
- All sections stacked vertically; no tabs.

cases.summary: E10 Weekday grid does not respect Saudi weekStartDay
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Open /employees/{id}/edit → tab «الجدول والاستراحات».
2. Inspect the day order.

Expected:
- Saturday first (Saudi default week-start).

Actual:
- Sunday first, Saturday last. The weekStartDay org setting is not honored by the scheduler.

cases.summary: E11 Scheduler has no split-shift support
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Open /employees/{id}/edit → Schedule tab.
2. Try to add a second working window for the same day (e.g. 09:00–13:00 then 16:00–20:00).

Expected:
- «إضافة فترة» / add another window per day, per plan §8.2.

Actual:
- Only one window per day + an «إضافة استراحة» break button. No way to split a shift.

cases.summary: E12 Specialties relation empty even when specialty fields are set
cases.text:
Steps:
1. GET /api/v1/dashboard/people/employees.

Expected:
- `specialties: [...]` contains the specialty records that match `specialty` / `specialtyAr`.

Actual:
- `specialty: "Dentistry"` and `specialtyAr: "أسنان"` are populated but `specialties: []`. The relation is never linked.

cases.summary: E13 Seed data is below plan spec
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Run seed.
2. Compare to plan §1.2.

Expected:
- 10+ employees, mixed active/inactive, 3+ specialties, 2+ branches, 5+ services, one rated employee, one with no experience.

Actual:
- 3 employees, all active, one branch, zero ratings. Filters/stats/pagination scenarios untestable.

cases.summary: E14 Filter state not reflected in URL
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Open /employees.
2. Apply search + status filter.
3. Check window.location.

Expected:
- /employees?search=…&status=active — reloadable / shareable.

Actual:
- URL stays /employees; filter state is component-local only.

cases.summary: E15 Filter-empty empty-state copy is the add-first-employee copy
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Open /employees.
2. Type `zzz` into the search box.

Expected:
- Copy like «لا توجد نتائج تطابق بحثك» — offer to clear the filter.

Post-fix (filter-aware empty state + new i18n keys employees.empty.filtered*):
- Copy now reads «لا توجد نتائج — لا يوجد ممارسون يطابقون معايير البحث. جرّب تعديل الفلاتر.»

cases.summary: E16 List API leaks raw join-table rows
cases.text:
Steps:
1. GET /api/v1/dashboard/people/employees.

Expected:
- Either hydrate branches/services with the target records, or omit the relation from the list shape.

Actual:
- Payload ships `branches: [{ id, employeeId, branchId }]` and `services: [{ id, employeeId, serviceId }]` — raw FK rows that the UI doesn't render.

cases.summary: E17 Initial load, stats, and filter requests pass
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Open /employees.
2. Observe network trace on first paint.

Expected:
- GET /dashboard/people/employees + /stats both 200/304; no console errors.

Actual:
- Both calls succeed; stats render `3 total / 3 active / 0 inactive / —`. No console errors.

cases.summary: E18 Status filter sends correct params
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Select `active` / `inactive` / `all` in the status combobox.

Expected:
- `isActive=true`, `isActive=false`, and no param (ghost check) respectively.

Actual:
- Verified in network trace: reqid=71 `isActive=true`, reqid=67 `isActive=false`, `all` omits the param. No boolean-casting bug.

cases.summary: E19 Search is debounced and server-side
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Type `zzz` into the search input.
2. Observe network.

Expected:
- Single debounced GET with `&search=zzz`.

Actual:
- reqid=59 GET /dashboard/people/employees?...&search=zzz — single call after debounce.

cases.summary: E20 Empty-submit validation fires on create form
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Open /employees/create.
2. Click «إنشاء الممارس» without filling anything.

Expected:
- Required fields show inline errors; submit is blocked.

Actual:
- 4 inline errors displayed (email, nameEn, nameAr, specialty EN). Submit blocked. (Translation issue tracked in E8.)

cases.summary: E21 Edit form tabs + isActive switch render
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Open /employees/{id}/edit.
2. Verify tabs and controls.

Expected:
- Three tabs (Basic / Schedule & Breaks / Services & Pricing); isActive switch visible on Basic tab.

Actual:
- All three tabs render; isActive switch present and checked for an active employee.

cases.summary: E22 Dark mode toggles cleanly on the list page
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Open /employees.
2. Click the «الوضع الداكن» toggle.

Expected:
- Background, stats cards, table, filter bar all switch to dark tokens; RTL preserved.

Actual:
- Toggle works; screenshot list-dark-rtl.png archived for reference.
